[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1110100 4
1 0101101 4
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 0000000 a
5 0000000 a
6 0000000 a
7 0010110 3

01 10 0010000 1
12 21 0111001 4
23 32 0110001 3
34 43 0100001 2
45 54 0100000 1
56 65 0110000 2
67 76 0100100 2
70 07 0000100 1

02 20 0010000 1
13 31 0110001 3
24 42 0100001 2
35 53 0110010 3
46 64 0100000 1
57 75 0100000 1
60 06 0010100 2
71 17 0101001 3

03 30 0010110 3 match 7
14 41 0100001 2
25 52 0110000 2
36 63 1110100 4 match 0
47 74 0100001 2
50 05 0010010 2
61 16 0110000 2
72 27 0101001 3

04 40 0000000 a match 2 3 4 5 6
15 51 0110000 2

37 73 0100101 3
